title: Add caching layer with multiple drivers
close_reason: Implemented complete caching system with Memory and File drivers. Added 26 comprehensive tests. All 320 tests passing.

title: Add pagination support
description: Implement Paginator class with paginate() method, page links, and JSON pagination for APIs
close_reason: Implemented complete pagination system with Paginator class, QueryBuilder.paginate(), Model.paginate(), page links generation, and API response helpers. All 23 pagination tests passing.

title: Add exception handling system
description: Implement exception handler with custom exceptions, error pages, and JSON error responses
close_reason: Implemented complete exception handling system with 11 exception classes (HttpException, BadRequestException, UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenException, NotFoundException, MethodNotAllowedException, ConflictException, UnprocessableEntityException, ValidationException, TooManyRequestsException, InternalServerErrorException, ServiceUnavailableException, ModelNotFoundException), ExceptionHandler with content negotiation for JSON/HTML responses, abort helper functions, and integration with Application. Added 43 comprehensive tests. All 277 tests passing.

title: Add database migrations system
description: Implement migration system with Schema builder, up/down methods, migration runner, and rollback
close_reason: Migrations system implemented with Schema builder (15+ column types), Migration base class, Migrator runner, and 5 CLI commands (make:migration, migrate, migrate:rollback, migrate:fresh, migrate:status). Supports batching, rollback, foreign keys, and indexes. All tested and working.

title: Add Eloquent relationships (hasMany, belongsTo)
description: Implement Model relationships: hasMany, belongsTo, hasOne, belongsToMany with eager loading support
close_reason: Implemented all 4 relationship types (hasOne, hasMany, belongsTo, belongsToMany) with full test coverage. All 24 relationship tests passing. Fixed bugs in QueryBuilder DELETE and BelongsTo methods. Eager loading deferred as future enhancement.

title: Create Artisan CLI tool
description: Build CLI with commands: make:controller, make:model, make:middleware, migrate, db:seed, serve, routes:list
close_reason: Artisan CLI tool implemented with 5 commands: make:controller, make:model, make:middleware, routes:list, and serve. All commands tested and working. Includes beautiful colored output and helpful feedback.

title: Add database seeders system
close_reason: Implemented complete database seeders system with Seeder base class, SeederManager for running seeders, db:seed and make:seeder Artisan commands, example DatabaseSeeder, and 10 comprehensive tests. All 287 tests passing.

title: build laravel but using bun typescript
Add queue system for background jobs
Add testing lib and usage example
Add eager loading for relationships
close_reason: Implemented complete eager loading system with support for HasOne, HasMany, and BelongsTo relationships. Added 7 comprehensive tests. All 294 tests passing.

title: Add missing Laravel-inspired features
description: Implement additional Laravel features to achieve feature parity: Collections, Eloquent relationships, migrations, seeders, artisan CLI, events, queues, caching, sessions, and more

title: Add helper functions (dd, dump, collect)
description: Implement Laravel-style helper functions: dd(), dump(), collect(), str(), array helpers
close_reason: Implemented Laravel-style helpers: dd(), dump(), Str class with 25+ methods, Arr class with 20+ methods, and utility helpers (optional, value, tap, retry, sleep, blank, filled). All 68 helper tests passing.

title: Add Collections class with Laravel-like methods
description: Implement Collection class with 20+ methods: map, filter, reduce, pluck, chunk, first, last, take, skip, sort, unique, etc. Most beloved Laravel feature.
close_reason: Collection class implemented with 40+ methods, integrated with Model.all(), and fully tested with 54 passing tests

title: Add event system with listeners
close_reason: Implemented complete event system with Event, Listener, and EventDispatcher classes. Supports multiple listener types, async operations, wildcard listeners, and comprehensive error handling. Added 18 comprehensive tests. All 338 tests passing.
